name: Fernando Duarte
bio:
Fernando Duarte is a professional ballet dancer and physique model based in [CITY]. Their work spans classical performance, contemporary dance, and high-fashion editorial. Trained at [TRAINING INSTITUTION], Fernando brings an artist's precision and a model's command to every project — whether on stage, in studio, or on set.

They are represented by [AGENCY NAME] and are available for performance engagements, editorial shoots, fitness campaigns, and brand partnerships.

featured.title: Nigel Barker × Fernando Duarte
featured.description: An editorial collaboration with acclaimed photographer and America's Next Top Model judge Nigel Barker.
